---
title: "Software Libraries"
listing:
  type: grid
  contents:
    - software/echoes.qmd
    - software/tensnd.qmd
    - software/chemistrylab.qmd
    - software/mpcm.qmd
  sort: false
  fields: [title, image, description, categories]
  grid-columns: 2
  max-description-length: 300
---

A selection of academic freeware or open-source scientific libraries I develop and maintain.
